# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
  name: my-instance-group
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
- type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  name: my-instance-template
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: f1-micro
      disk:
        autoDelete: true
        boot: true
        deviceName: persistent-disk0
      networkInterfaces:
      - accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes: ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_only']
- type: deploymentmanager.v2.types.Deployment
  name: my-deployment
  properties:
    spec:
      zone: us-central1-a
      template:
        instanceTemplate: my-instance-template
        instances:
          - name: my-instance-name
            networkInterfaces:
              - accessConfigs:
                - name: External NAT
                  type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
